headline: Mariner Logistics Names Justin Turner Chief Executive Officer
summary: --Proven freight and logistics growth executive takes the helm of the asset-backed 4PL-- Justin Turner Justin Turner, Mariner CEO DALLAS and COPPELL, Texas, July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mariner Logistics, an integrated, asset-backed 4PL with an extensive Dallas/Fort Worth footprint, today announced the appointment of Justin Turner as Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately. Turner brings nearly two decades of experience leading commercial organizations through periods of rapid growth
